return y(U)end,function(r,o)local y=m(o)local a=function(a,g,E,s,U,G)return n(r,{a,g,E,s,U;G},o,y)end return a end,function(r,o)local y=m(o)local a=function(a,g,E,s)return n(r,{a,g,E;s},o,y)end return
